articles.author: Erika Edwards
articles.title: Blood test added to colorectal cancer screening options by cancer group - NBC News
articles.description: For the first time, a blood test has been added to the list of the American Cancer Society’s recommended screenings for colorectal cancer.
articles.content: For the first time, a blood test has been added to the list of the American Cancer Societys recommended screenings for colorectal cancer. Its not meant to replace colonoscopies, aiming instead at cat… [+4559 chars]
